files.description: BlueEdge certified substrate baseline, operationalization safety envelope, domain operationalization map (13 domains eligible for upgrade), intermediate milestones, baseline immutability contract
First safe overlay definition (1 package, 2-4 LINEAGE_UPGRADE entries, DOMAIN + TECHNICAL classes), 7-phase pathway with BlueEdge-specific context, success criteria, failure modes
3-phase S2 to S3 progression (Phase A: 2-4 domains, Phase B: expansion to 9-14, Phase C: completion to 17/17), S3 gate analysis, disclosure requirements (76% overlay-derived), progression invariants
BlueEdge-specific 5-input replay model, 8-step reconstruction with substrate verification, 4 replay scenarios (baseline, first overlay, multi-overlay, post-revocation), replay guarantees
4 revocation scenarios (single package, cascade, full reset, version rollback) with BlueEdge state impacts, state restoration guarantees, S-state regression behavior, revocation artifacts
8 risks (R-01 through R-08) with severity/likelihood classification, mitigation strategies, risk acceptance decisions (R-01 and R-06 NOT ACCEPTED — must be zero)
3-stage controlled progressive model (SMALL-VERIFY-EXPAND-VERIFY-COMPLETE-VERIFY), 6 sequencing rules, stage gate reviews, emergency halt procedure, monitoring checkpoints
8 sequential gates (GATE 0-7): substrate, package, class, replay, audit, re-evaluation, rollback, authorization — sequential fail-closed, gate-to-phase mapping, failure handling

Grounding boundary evidence standards for BlueEdge domain upgrades, Q-class and S-state transition boundaries, no bulk/cascading/inference certification, certification-to-S3 pathway, post-certification obligations
4 expansion types (crosswalk extension, label assignment, domain typing, capability binding), certified baseline protection, expansion impact on qualification, expansion sequencing
6 checkpoints (pre-activation through revocation), 8 mandatory BlueEdge audit queries, audit trail structure, mandatory disclosure at 4 context levels, hash chain integrity verification
9-point path boundary compliance matrix with BlueEdge-specific verification, data flow diagram, 10 mandatory design questions answered, governance confirmation
Pre-flight confirmation, scope declaration, 9 upstream references loaded, 12 execution steps documented, governance confirmation (no runtime implementation)
File change manifest for stream execution
Stream closure document with completion status, validation summary, governance confirmation

governance_notes: Specification-only contract. No runtime artifacts produced. No validators modified. No existing artifacts mutated. Architecture defines operational safety envelope for future controlled overlay execution.
